connections.def: from 4692; "speed", i.e. (by implication) despatch, eagerness, earnestness:--business, (earnest) care(-fulness), diligence, forwardness, haste. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: do (give) diligence, be diligent (forward), endeavour, labour, study
connections.def: from 4710; to use speed, i.e. to make effort, be prompt or earnest:--do (give) diligence, be diligent (forward), endeavour, labour, study. see GREEK for
